source: Curated from operator disclosures, GIE AGSI+/ALSI, EIA, GEM (CC-BY 4.0), regulator filings

rehden.name: Rehden Gas Storage
rehden.operator: Astora (formerly Gazprom Germania, now SEFE Storage)

yamal-lng.name: Yamal LNG (Sabetta)
yamal-lng.operator: Novatek / CNPC / TotalEnergies / Silk Road Fund

arctic-lng-2.name: Arctic LNG 2 (Gydan)
arctic-lng-2.operator: Novatek / CNPC / CNOOC / TotalEnergies / Japan Arctic LNG

gladstone-lng.name: Gladstone LNG (Curtis Island)
gladstone-lng.operator: Santos / Shell / Origin (combined GLNG + QCLNG + APLNG)

fujairah-hub.name: Fujairah Oil Storage Hub
fujairah-hub.operator: ADNOC Distribution / Gulf Petrochem / VTTI / Vopak (multi-operator)

evidence.note: Fill levels not publicly disclosed — country-level aggregate only (Kpler, OilX satellite estimates)

operatorStatement.text: Closed 2017 due to well integrity; partial reopening 2022 under temporary license at reduced capacity (~20% of historical). Full restoration under evaluation.

huangdao-spr.name: Huangdao Strategic Petroleum Reserve
huangdao-spr.operator: China National Petroleum Reserves Center / Sinopec

trinidad-atlantic-lng.name: Atlantic LNG (Point Fortin)
trinidad-atlantic-lng.operator: Atlantic LNG Company of Trinidad and Tobago

costa-azul-lng.name: Energía Costa Azul LNG (reverse to export)

vietnam-nghi-son-storage.name: Nghi Son Refinery Crude Storage
vietnam-nghi-son-storage.operator: Nghi Son Refinery and Petrochemical (Idemitsu-led JV)

evidence.operatorStatement: Feedgas constrained by upstream disruptions; Train 7 expansion underway (operator IR).

peru-lng.name: Perú LNG (Pampa Melchorita)
peru-lng.operator: Perú LNG (Hunt Oil / SK / Shell / Marubeni)

nwsh-karratha-lng.name: North West Shelf LNG (Karratha Gas Plant)
nwsh-karratha-lng.operator: Woodside Energy (on behalf of NWS JV)

batangas-lng.name: Batangas LNG Terminal (FGEN / AG&P)
batangas-lng.operator: First Gen / AG&P Atlantic Gulf & Pacific

evidence.operatorStatement: PDVSA output collapse since 2017; sanctions + infrastructure degradation limit throughput (OFAC-designated).

santos-br.name: Port of Santos Petroleum Tank Farm (Transpetro/Alemoa)

evidence.operatorStatement: Persistent theft + pipeline sabotage on Nembe Creek / Trans-Niger feeders caps effective throughput below nameplate.

es-sider-ly.name: Es Sider Crude Oil Terminal
es-sider-ly.operator: Waha Oil Company (NOC Libya / ConocoPhillips / Total / Hess JV)

evidence.operatorStatement: Libya Oil Crescent terminals (Es Sider, Ras Lanuf, Zueitina, Brega) face recurrent NOC force-majeure declarations tied to political blockades.

ras-lanuf-ly.name: Ras Lanuf Crude Oil Terminal
ras-lanuf-ly.operator: Harouge Oil Operations (NOC Libya / Petro-Canada successor)

evidence.operatorStatement: Oil Crescent terminal — tank farm damaged during 2011/2018/2019 conflict periods; partial recovery but below nameplate.
Russia crude flow subject to G7+EU price cap (Dec 2022) and EU seaborne crude embargo; physical operation continues, commercial channels narrowed.
ESPO Blend export hub; continues under G7+EU price cap regime; primary buyers China, India.
TOR has operated intermittently due to financial distress and feedstock shortages through the 2010s-2020s.

kirkuk-iq.name: Kirkuk Field Crude Storage (North Oil Company)

evidence.operatorStatement: Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline halted March 2023 after ICC arbitration ruling; Kurdistan crude route suspended.

djibouti-horizon.name: Horizon Djibouti Terminals
djibouti-horizon.operator: Horizon Djibouti Terminals Ltd (Emirates National Oil Co.)

evidence.operatorStatement: Russian crude exports via Ventspils halted in 2010 after Transneft rerouted to Primorsk/Ust-Luga; terminal converted to refined product trade only.
